sizing_rule.note: Apply optimal f (f*) independently to each leg when holding multiple simultaneous positions with zero correlation between all legs. HPR calculation uses correlation coefficient of zero for net position. Formula differentiates between long options at debit and short options at credit.

source_rule_text: For multiple simultaneous positions with zero correlation between all legs, calculate the HPR (Holding Period Return) for the net position using the correlation coefficient of zero.
